title: Qing Shui
content:
Qing Shui
 is one of 
Wang Lin's
 few friends. They share a similar tragic past and they both walked down the path of slaughter and solitude. He eventually breaks through to the Third Step with the Slaughter Essence.

Background
[
]

He is an ancient Celestial Lord from the before the collapse of the 
Thunder Celestial Realm
. Due to some reason, he went mad and killed countless celestials that included his friends, family and even his wife. Finally, he was defeated by the Celestial Emperor, 
Bai Fan
, and regained his sanity. Ridden with grief and guilt at his actions, he attempted to destroy his origin soul and body. In order to prevent the Ji Realm from resurrecting him, he used his magical treasure, the Sealing Vortex, and sealed his origin soul and body in nine parts. Unable to watch him die, Celestial Emperor Bai Fan placed down a healing formation over the seals in hope that Qing Shui would regain his sanity one day.

Due to the seals and the healing formation, Qing Shui managed to survive the events caused by the 
Heavenly Madness
.

In time he meets Wang Lin and believes he is the next successor to his master's technique, Call The Wind.

Trivia
[
]

Qing Shui is one of the few cultivators who owns the 
Ji Realm
.

↑

Qing Shui is the prince of Clear water and has the Ji Realm. The State of Clear Water was first mentioned in relation to the Ji Realm in Chapter 105.
